case_title: LUCKEY, HORACE et al VS TENDERLOIN NEIBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL SENT TO AGENT FOR SERVICE TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. RETURNED SIGNED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. HEARING SET FOR JUN-09-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUCKEY, HORACE LUCKEY, TANIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REM: CASE IS PUT OVER TO 6-11-98 @ 8:30 AM. POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT.
REM: ACTION HEARD BY COMM. FENSTERMACHER ON 6-11-98 @ 8:30 AM. -UNABLE TO SETTLED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-09-1998, GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LUCKEY, HORACE LUCKEY, TANIA AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUCKEY, HORACE LUCKEY, TANIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. $300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00, DEFENDANTS TO RETURN TO PLAINTIFFS EXCERCISE EQUIPMENT BELONGING TO THEM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
